abilities.name: Grow Up Strong (Wild Boar)
abilities.text: After this model removes an enemy Remains marker or enemy Scheme marker, this model may remove a Glutted token to replace itself with a Wild Boar and heal 4. If it does not have a Glutted token, it instead gains a Glutted token.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may remove a Glutted token to reduce the damage dealt by 2.

triggers.name: Crunch Down
triggers.text: This model either heals 2 or gains a Glutted token.

triggers.name: Smolder
triggers.text: If the target has a Burning token, it resolves the Burning token. Then, it gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Bowled Over
triggers.text: Move the target 4" away, then move this model 4" toward the target.

triggers.name: Grab On
triggers.text: Target gains a Slow token. End this model's activation.

actions.name: Rooting Around
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Remains or Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Move this model up to 4" toward the target, then remove the target.
